product_overview: Dark Angels is a Telegram Mini App for browsing luxury travel, services, and blog content with multilingual public pages. It also includes an authenticated admin area for managing content, homepage collections, account security, and profile settings.
core_goals: Browse featured content from the homepage and navigate to tours, services, blog posts, and contact information
Search, filter, and open detailed public content pages for tours, services, and blog articles
Sign in to the admin area and access protected management tools
Create, edit, publish, and delete tours, services, and blog articles
Reorder homepage collections and manage featured content placement
Configure admin account security with two-factor authentication and profile settings

features.name: Homepage Carousels
features.description: Lets users view featured tours, services, and blog content on the homepage and move through curated items horizontally.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through featured content carousels -> Observe additional items in each curated section -> Open a featured item from a carousel
Navigate to / -> Use the navigation controls to move through a carousel -> Observe the next set of featured items -> Open a featured item from the carousel

features.name: Public Tour Browsing
features.description: Allows users to browse the tour catalog, refine results, and open individual tour details.
user_flows: Navigate to /tours -> Type search text -> Click tag filter pills -> Review the filtered tour list -> Open a tour card -> See tour details
Navigate to /tours -> Review the tour list -> Open a tour card -> See the selected tour detail page

features.name: Public Service Browsing
features.description: Allows users to browse the service catalog, refine results, and open individual service details.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> Search services -> Click tag filter pills -> Review the filtered service list -> Open a service card -> See service details
Navigate to /services -> Review the service list -> Open a service card -> See the selected service detail page

features.name: Public Blog Reading
features.description: Allows users to browse articles, refine results, and read full blog posts rendered in markdown.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog -> Search articles -> Click tag filter pills -> Review the filtered article list -> Open an article card -> Read the markdown detail page
Navigate to /blog -> Review the article list -> Open an article card -> Read the full blog article

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: Provides a 5-tab navigation bar for switching between the main public pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click a navigation tab -> See the selected destination page -> Click another navigation tab -> See the next page
Navigate to /tours -> Click a navigation tab -> See the corresponding public section page

features.name: Admin Login and Auth
features.description: Lets an administrator sign in with email and password to access the protected admin area, including handling invalid credentials as a user-input-driven validation outcome.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill in email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the admin dashboard
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill in email and password -> Submit the login form -> See an error message for invalid credentials

features.name: Admin TOTP 2FA
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin to set up, verify, disable, and use recovery codes for two-factor authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/two-factor -> View the QR code -> Enter a 6-digit code -> Submit verification -> See confirmation that two-factor authentication is enabled
Navigate to /admin/two-factor -> Copy the recovery codes -> Save the recovery codes for future access
Navigate to /admin/two-factor -> Enter a valid recovery code -> Submit recovery access -> Regain account access
Navigate to /admin/two-factor -> Disable two-factor authentication -> Confirm the change -> See confirmation that two-factor authentication is turned off

features.name: Admin Tour CRUD
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin to manage tours by creating, editing, publishing, unpublishing, and deleting records with localized content and image support.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/tours -> Click Create New -> Fill in RU and EN title, description, country, and city -> Upload an image -> Toggle VIP options -> Save the tour -> See the new tour in the list
Navigate to /admin/tours -> Open an existing tour -> Update localized fields -> Change publish status -> Save the tour -> See the updated tour in the list
Navigate to /admin/tours -> Open an existing tour -> Delete the tour -> Confirm deletion -> See the tour removed from the list

features.name: Admin Service CRUD
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin to manage services by creating, editing, publishing, unpublishing, and deleting records with localized content and image support.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/services -> Create a new service -> Fill in RU and EN title and description -> Set the price and contacts -> Toggle publish status -> Save the service -> See the new service in the list
Navigate to /admin/services -> Open an existing service -> Update localized fields and pricing details -> Save the service -> See the updated service in the list
Navigate to /admin/services -> Open an existing service -> Delete the service -> Confirm deletion -> See the service removed from the list

features.name: Admin Blog CRUD
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin to manage blog articles by creating, editing, publishing, hiding VIP content, and deleting markdown-based posts with access controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/blog -> Create a new article -> Write markdown content -> Select an access level -> Toggle hidden VIP status if needed -> Save the article -> See the new article in the list
Navigate to /admin/blog -> Open an existing article -> Edit the markdown content -> Change publish status -> Save the article -> See the updated article in the list
Navigate to /admin/blog -> Open an existing article -> Delete the article -> Confirm deletion -> See the article removed from the list

features.name: Admin Collections DnD
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin to reorder homepage collections and pin, unpin, or remove featured items.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/collections -> Switch to a section tab -> Drag an item to a new position -> Save the new order -> See the collection reordered
Navigate to /admin/collections -> Switch to a section tab -> Pin an item -> Observe the pinned state applied -> Unpin the item -> Observe the pinned state removed
Navigate to /admin/collections -> Switch to a section tab -> Remove an item -> Confirm the removal -> See the item removed from the collection

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin to review account details and update email or password using the current password for confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings -> View profile details, including email, 2FA status, and account dates
Navigate to /admin/settings -> Enter a new email and current password -> Submit the change -> See the updated email reflected in profile details
Navigate to /admin/settings -> Enter a current password and a new password -> Submit the change -> See confirmation that the password was updated

features.name: Public Tour Browsing
features.description: Browse tours with search, filter, pagination, detail view

features.name: Public Service Browsing
features.description: Browse services with search, filter, pagination, detail view

features.name: Public Blog Reading
features.description: Browse blog articles with search, filter, markdown rendering

features.name: Homepage Carousels
features.description: Featured tours/services/blog carousels with scroll-snap

features.name: Admin Login and Auth
features.description: Email/password login, JWT tokens, httpOnly cookies, account lockout

features.name: Admin TOTP 2FA
features.description: QR code setup, 6-digit verify, disable, recovery codes

features.name: Admin Tour CRUD
features.description: Create, edit, delete tours with localized fields, image upload
user_interactions: Fill RU/EN title, description, country, city

features.name: Admin Service CRUD
features.description: Create, edit, delete services with localized fields, image upload

features.name: Admin Blog CRUD
features.description: Create, edit, delete blog articles with markdown, access levels

features.name: Admin Collections DnD
features.description: Drag-and-drop reorder homepage items, pin/unpin

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: View profile, change email, change password

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: 5-tab bottom nav with animated transitions
user_interactions: Click nav tabs to switch pages

known_limitations.issue: Mock mode with in-memory DB, data resets on restart
Image upload unavailable in mock mode
known_limitations.impact: Upload returns errors without real Supabase
